answer: Store users and tasks in memory. Add role field to existing user model. CLI experience good [1].

answer: [User model] [Store in memory] [Hold data]. [First Admin] [Bootstrap via environment variables ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD] [No registration endpoint for Admin].

question:
ContinueInterrogation

[Regular Users] [Need creation flow] [Admin bootstrapped from env]. How are regular Users created: by the Admin, or through a public  /register  endpoint?
answer: Regular Users created through public `/register` endpoint. Default role on registration is User.

question:
ContinueInterrogation

[Tasks] [Need visibility rule] [Only Admin creates]. Are tasks global (all Users can read/update all tasks), or are they owned/assigned to specific users?
answer: Tasks global. Any authenticated user read all tasks. Admin only create and delete. No user ownership.
